title: XZesty XCrisp Tropical Tomato Tagine
description: A tangy, crisp Filipino dish featuring turmeric powder that is kid-friendly and shojin-friendly. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Chop the tomatoes into small pieces.
Dice the onions and mince the garlic cloves.
Heat a cazuela or tagine over medium heat. Add oil, then sauté the onions until translucent.
Add minced garlic to the onions and cook for about 30 seconds.
Fold in the chopped tomatoes, turmeric powder, and salt. Stir well.
Let it simmer until most of the liquid has evaporated and the mixture is thick.
If using, sprinkle unsweetened shredded coconut over the top before serving to garnish.
Serve hot as a snack or light meal.
